summary: A finite set of named targets for touch, collect, visit, or score objectives.
constraints: Store target names in registry lists, not ObjectRecord or Body instances.
Append each target name to objective_targets after creation.
Use deterministic distance/contact checks and persistent state for collection.
For finite target tasks, require Tier 5 solved verification.
repair_guidance: If all targets are touched by the oracle but check_objective is false, persist touched target names instead of requiring simultaneous contact.
If targets are too spread out for the declared capability profile, reduce spread or increase movement capability.
